ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transcriptions" (
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription */,
  "transcription_text" TEXT /* Text content of the transcription */,
  "transcription_type" TEXT /* Type of transcription (e.g., speech, text) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the transcription */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the transcription was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the transcription was last modified */,
  "transcription_status" TEXT /* Status of the transcription (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transcription_quality_score" REAL /* Overall quality score of the transcription */,
  "transcription_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the transcription (for speech data) */,
  "transcription_language" TEXT /* Language of the transcription */,
  "transcription_source_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcriptions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., audio file, text document) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location where the source is stored */,
  "source_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription the word belongs to */,
  "word_text" TEXT /* Text of the word */,
  "hypothesized_word" TEXT /* Hypothesized word in the transcription */,
  "reference_word" TEXT /* Reference word for comparison */,
  "h_pos_tag" TEXT /* Part-of-speech tag for the hypothesized word */,
  "r_pos_tag" TEXT /* Part-of-speech tag for the reference word */,
  "h_saliency_score" REAL /* Saliency score of the hypothesized word */,
  "r_saliency_score" REAL /* Saliency score of the reference word */,
  "sentiment_orientation" INTEGER /* Sentiment orientation of the word */,
  "h_num_phonemes" INTEGER /* Number of phonemes in the hypothesized word */,
  "r_num_phonemes" INTEGER /* Number of phonemes in the reference word */,
  "h_word_type" TEXT /* Type of the hypothesized word (e.g., None, Content) */,
  "r_word_type" TEXT /* Type of the reference word (e.g., Function, Content) */,
  "r_importance_score" REAL /* Importance score of the reference word */,
  "word_position" INTEGER /* Position of the word in the transcription */,
  "word_context" TEXT /* Context in which the word appears */,
  "word_confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the hypothesized word */,
  "word_audio_offset" TEXT /* Start and end time offsets for the word in the audio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_h_pos_tag FOREIGN KEY ("h_pos_tag") REFERENCES pos_tags ("pos_tag"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_r_pos_tag FOREIGN KEY ("r_pos_tag") REFERENCES pos_tags ("pos_tag"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_transcription_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcription_id") REFERENCES transcriptions ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_r_word_type FOREIGN KEY ("r_word_type") REFERENCES word_types ("word_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_sentiment_orientation FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_orientation") REFERENCES sentiment_orientations ("sentiment_orientation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_r_saliency_score FOREIGN KEY ("r_saliency_score") REFERENCES saliency_scores ("saliency_score"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_r_num_phonemes FOREIGN KEY ("r_num_phonemes") REFERENCES phonemes ("phoneme_count"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_h_word_type FOREIGN KEY ("h_word_type") REFERENCES word_types ("word_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_h_saliency_score FOREIGN KEY ("h_saliency_score") REFERENCES saliency_scores ("saliency_score"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_h_num_phonemes FOREIGN KEY ("h_num_phonemes") REFERENCES phonemes ("phoneme_count"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_r_importance_score FOREIGN KEY ("r_importance_score") REFERENCES importance_scores ("importance_score")
)

CREATE TABLE "pos_tags" (
  "pos_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each POS tag */,
  "pos_tag" TEXT /* Part-of-speech tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the POS tag */,
  "pos_tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the POS tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pos_tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saliency_scores" (
  "saliency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saliency score */,
  "saliency_score" REAL /* Saliency score value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the saliency score */,
  "saliency_score_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used to determine the saliency score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saliency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_orientations" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment orientation */,
  "sentiment_orientation" INTEGER /* Sentiment orientation value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment orientation */,
  "sentiment_intensity" TEXT /* Intensity of the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phonemes" (
  "phoneme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phoneme count */,
  "phoneme_count" INTEGER /* Number of phonemes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phoneme count */,
  "phoneme_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the phoneme */,
  "phoneme_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the phoneme in the transcription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phoneme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_types" (
  "word_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word type */,
  "word_type" TEXT /* Word type (e.g., None, Content) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the word type */,
  "word_type_weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the word type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "importance_scores" (
  "importance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each importance score */,
  "importance_score" REAL /* Importance score value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the importance score */,
  "importance_score_threshold" REAL /* Threshold used to determine the importance score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("importance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, linguist, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transcription_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transcription */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transcription was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the transcription */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transcription_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcription_id") REFERENCES transcriptions ("transcription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
